# Production Readiness Checklist: Photo Classification Platform

**Purpose**: Pre-implementation requirements readiness review for durable async processing, privacy, safety, permissions, local runtime validation, and CI scope.
**Created**: 2026-05-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are durable `ClassificationJob` outbox ownership, required fields, publish status lifecycle, retry counters, locking fields, and uniqueness/idempotency constraints fully specified across the model and task artifacts? [Completeness, Spec §Key Entities, Data Model §ClassificationJob Payload, Tasks §T014/T041/T047]
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements complete for accepting a submission into `pending_classification` only when a durable Django-owned outbox row exists? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016/FR-040, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T037/T048]
- [ ] CHK003 Are async retry requirements defined for broker publish failures, classifier timeouts, malformed classifier responses, missing object storage objects, duplicate delivery, and retry exhaustion? [Completeness, Spec §US2 Scenario 4/US3 Scenario 5/Edge Cases, Plan §Celery Worker, Tasks §T047/T053/T057/T069/T071]
- [ ] CHK004 Are idempotency requirements documented for duplicate `job_id` delivery, duplicate outbox publication attempts, duplicate `ClassificationResult` persistence, and latest-result pointer updates? [Completeness, Plan §Celery Worker, Data Model §ClassificationResult, Tasks §T055/T062/T071]
- [ ] CHK005 Are submission status state-machine requirements complete for all declared statuses, allowed transitions, rejected transitions, terminal-state immutability, and explicit future reclassification behavior? [Completeness, Data Model §Submission Status Values, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T015/T040/T069/T071]
- [ ] CHK006 Are object storage cleanup requirements complete for failed database transactions, failed durable job row creation, RabbitMQ publish failure policy, and permanent submission deletion? [Completeness, Spec §US2 Scenario 4/FR-040, Data Model §Data Retention and Privacy, Tasks §T043/T048/T090/T094]
- [ ] CHK007 Are EXIF, GPS, and application metadata stripping requirements specified for both object storage persistence and classifier handoff? [Completeness, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T013/T021/T038/T043]
- [ ] CHK008 Are classifier safety boundaries complete for request inputs, response fields, persistence validation, future provider output, fallback behavior, and stored raw/sanitized provider metadata? [Completeness, Spec §SR-001..SR-008, Data Model §Classification Result Constraints, Tasks §T058/T070/T077-T080/T091/T095]
- [ ] CHK009 Are demographic invariance requirements complete for all listed metadata fields and all outcome dimensions: category, decision, score, priority, quality, safety, suitability, and pass/fail outcome? [Completeness, Spec §SR-004/SR-005, Data Model §Data Retention and Privacy, Tasks §T059]
- [ ] CHK010 Are payload minimization requirements complete for Celery payloads, worker-to-classifier requests, logs, stored raw responses, and generated API/admin responses? [Completeness, Plan §Data and Storage Plan, Data Model §ClassificationJob Payload/Privacy Rules, Tasks §T060/T061/T072/T076/T080/T081/T091/T095]
- [ ] CHK011 Are authentication, regular-user ownership, public registration non-admin guarantees, and admin-only access requirements complete across API and Django Admin surfaces? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001..FR-005/FR-023/FR-029, Data Model §User Constraints, Tasks §T027-T039/T074-T076]
- [ ] CHK012 Are Django Admin-only admin scope requirements complete enough to prevent accidental implementation of separate `/api/admin/submissions/` endpoints unless the source documents are changed? [Completeness, Plan §API Plan, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T076, Spec §Assumptions/Out of Scope]
- [ ] CHK013 Are Docker Compose quickstart requirements complete for all required services, health endpoints, migration/superuser steps, Nginx exposure, and internal-only classifier access? [Completeness, Spec §FR-032/SC-006, Plan §Project Structure/Deployment Plan, Quickstart §Prerequisites/Local Setup Flow]
- [ ] CHK014 Are CI test categories complete for API, classifier, worker, contract, database, safety, Docker builds, Docker Compose smoke, deployment manifest validation, and no external model-provider credentials? [Completeness, Spec §FR-034/SC-007, Plan §Testing Plan, Quickstart §Test Commands, Tasks §T009/T086/T088/T098]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK015 Is the outbox publish-status lifecycle named and defined with precise states, transitions, retry exhaustion meaning, and owner component responsibilities? [Clarity, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T014/T024/T041/T047, Data Model §ClassificationJob Payload]
- [ ] CHK016 Is the term "safe retries" quantified or otherwise clarified with retry count, backoff, timeout, and terminal failure policy requirements? [Ambiguity, Spec §US3 Scenario 5, Plan §Celery Worker, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T053/T057/T069/T071/T073]
- [ ] CHK017 Is the state-machine contract clear about whether `classification_failed` is terminal, retryable, or reviewable, and which component may move it forward? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-040, Data Model §Submission Status Values, Tasks §T015/T071]
- [ ] CHK018 Are object storage cleanup boundaries clear for when uploaded objects are deleted versus retained for retryable operational diagnosis? [Clarity, Spec §US2 Scenario 4/FR-040, Data Model §Data Retention and Privacy, Tasks §T043/T048]
- [ ] CHK019 Are image normalization requirements clear about whether metadata stripping preserves the original image format, validates dimensions after normalization, and rejects images that cannot be safely rewritten? [Clarity, Spec §FR-037..FR-039, Tasks §T013/T021/T038/T043]
- [ ] CHK020 Are classifier request requirements clear about the exact "minimal technical metadata" allowed in worker-to-classifier calls? [Ambiguity, Plan §Architecture Flow/Data and Storage Plan, Data Model §ClassificationJob Payload, Tasks §T060/T080]
- [ ] CHK021 Are forbidden classifier output fields defined with enough precision for future provider metadata, `raw_response`, and provider-specific nested structures? [Clarity, Spec §SR-003/SR-007, Data Model §Classification Result Constraints, Tasks §T058/T070/T079/T091/T095]
- [ ] CHK022 Is "demographic metadata" defined consistently to include name, age, place of living, gender, country of origin, and any future demographic-like fields? [Clarity, Spec §SR-004..SR-006, Data Model §Submission, Tasks §T059/T060]
- [ ] CHK023 Are Django Admin requirements clear about staff versus superuser permissions, readonly fields, search fields, filters, and classification history visibility? [Clarity, Spec §US4/FR-024..FR-029, Data Model §User Constraints/Submission Indexes, Tasks §T074-T076]
- [ ] CHK024 Are Docker Compose validation requirements clear about which services are public, which are internal, and which local debug consoles must remain production-private? [Clarity, Plan §Project Structure/Deployment Plan, Quickstart §Local Setup Flow, Tasks §T007/T008/T086-T088]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK025 Do the spec, plan, data model, and tasks agree that Django owns auth, object storage orchestration, job publishing, persistence, and admin while FastAPI remains stateless and internal? [Consistency, Spec §FR-030/FR-031, Plan §Service Responsibilities, Data Model §Data Ownership, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions]
- [ ] CHK026 Do the accepted status mappings align across `spec.md`, `plan.md`, `data-model.md`, and status mapping tasks without alternate names or conflicting terminal states? [Consistency, Spec §US3 Scenarios/FR-016/FR-040, Plan §Classification Plan, Data Model §Status Mapping, Tasks §T054/T071]
- [ ] CHK027 Are payload minimization rules consistent between RabbitMQ/Celery payloads, classifier requests, database raw-response rules, and logging safety rules? [Consistency, Plan §Data and Storage Plan, Data Model §ClassificationJob Payload/Privacy Rules, Tasks §T060/T061/T080/T081/T091/T095]
- [ ] CHK028 Are safety boundaries consistent between allowed classifier categories, allowed review decisions, forbidden person-trait requirements, and admin/search use of demographic metadata? [Consistency, Spec §Classification Safety Requirements, Plan §Classification Plan, Data Model §Allowed Categories/Decisions, Tasks §T058/T059]
- [ ] CHK029 Are Docker Compose services in `quickstart.md` consistent with the services and exposure boundaries required in `plan.md` and `tasks.md`? [Consistency, Plan §Project Structure, Quickstart §Prerequisites, Tasks §T007/T008/T088]
- [ ] CHK030 Are CI validation categories in `spec.md`, `plan.md`, `quickstart.md`, and `tasks.md` aligned with no missing or contradictory required command group? [Consistency, Spec §FR-034/SC-007, Plan §Testing Plan, Quickstart §Test Commands, Tasks §T009/T098]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK031 Can the durable outbox readiness criteria be objectively measured from requirements, including existence of outbox rows, publish-attempt tracking, retry exhaustion, and no pending orphan submissions? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §FR-040, Tasks §T037/T041/T047/T048]
- [ ] CHK032 Can idempotency readiness be objectively measured for duplicate job delivery without duplicate results or duplicate latest-pointer advancement? [Acceptance Criteria, Data Model §ClassificationResult, Tasks §T055/T071]
- [ ] CHK033 Can state-machine readiness be objectively measured for every allowed, rejected, and terminal transition before worker implementation starts? [Acceptance Criteria, Data Model §Submission Status Values, Tasks §T015/T040/T069/T071]
- [ ] CHK034 Can EXIF/GPS stripping readiness be objectively measured from requirements without inspecting implementation-specific image libraries? [Acceptance Criteria, Tasks §T013/T021/T038/T043]
- [ ] CHK035 Can classifier safety readiness be objectively measured for no person identification, no sensitive trait inference, no forbidden output fields, and submission-review-only persisted results? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SR-001..SR-008/SC-005, Tasks §T058/T077-T079]
- [ ] CHK036 Can Docker Compose quickstart readiness be objectively measured from documented setup, health, smoke, and exposure expectations? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-006, Quickstart §Local Setup Flow/Functional Smoke Test/Async Processing Validation, Tasks §T088/T097]
- [ ] CHK037 Can CI readiness be objectively measured from named test categories, command groups, Docker image checks, and explicit credential-free rule-based classifier constraints? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-007, Plan §Testing Plan, Quickstart §Test Commands, Tasks §T009/T098]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK038 Are primary, alternate, exception, and recovery scenarios documented for submission creation when storage, database, durable outbox creation, and broker publication succeed or fail in different orders? [Coverage, Spec §US2 Scenario 4/Edge Cases, Tasks §T037/T043/T047/T048]
- [ ] CHK039 Are worker recovery scenarios documented for unavailable classifier, timeout, malformed response, missing object, already terminal submission, duplicate delivery, and retry exhaustion? [Coverage, Spec §US3 Scenario 5/Edge Cases, Tasks §T053/T069/T071]
- [ ] CHK040 Are object deletion scenarios documented for admin or future retention deletion, worker jobs racing with deleted submissions, and storage objects that cannot be deleted? [Coverage, Data Model §Data Retention and Privacy, Spec §Edge Cases, Tasks §T043/T053/T090/T094]
- [ ] CHK041 Are auth and ownership scenarios documented for anonymous users, regular users accessing other users' submissions, public registration with admin fields, staff/admin users, and non-admin Django Admin access attempts? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases/FR-003/FR-005/FR-023/FR-029, Tasks §T029/T039/T075]
- [ ] CHK042 Are classifier safety scenarios documented for default rule-based classification, future provider fallback, provider misconfiguration/unavailability, and unsafe provider outputs? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases/SR-001..SR-008, Plan §FastAPI Classifier, Tasks §T056/T058/T067/T077-T079]
- [ ] CHK043 Are quickstart smoke scenarios documented for auth, upload, async processing, latest result retrieval, admin review, forbidden trait absence, duplicate job handling, and internal-only classifier exposure? [Coverage, Quickstart §Functional Smoke Test/Async Processing Validation/Safety Validation, Tasks §T088/T097]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK044 Are privacy and data minimization requirements specified for stored database fields, object storage references, Celery payloads, classifier requests, logs, signed URLs, and admin visibility? [Non-Functional, Spec §SR-006, Data Model §Privacy Rules, Tasks §T060/T061/T072/T076/T080/T081/T091/T095]
- [ ] CHK045 Are security requirements specified for private buckets, no permanent public URLs, internal-only classifier, public-only Nginx entry point, and production-private PostgreSQL/RabbitMQ/object storage? [Non-Functional, Spec §FR-012/FR-013/FR-031, Plan §Deployment Plan, Quickstart §Local Setup Flow/Kubernetes Validation Direction, Tasks §T008/T086-T088]
- [ ] CHK046 Are reliability requirements specified for async processing observability, retry/backoff, worker health, queue/task observability, and safe failure states? [Non-Functional, Plan §API Plan/Testing Plan, Quickstart §Async Processing Validation, Tasks §T057/T069/T071/T093/T096]
- [ ] CHK047 Are performance requirements adequate for the stated goal that uploads remain responsive by queueing classification and worker/classifier components scale independently? [Non-Functional, Plan §Technical Context/Performance Goals, Spec §FR-015, Tasks §T092/T096]
- [ ] CHK048 Are migration and data integrity requirements specified for constraints, indexes, latest-result pointer behavior, and migration checks in CI? [Non-Functional, Data Model §Submission Indexes/Classification Result Indexes, Plan §Testing Plan, Tasks §T042/T063/T089]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK049 Are assumptions about deterministic rule-based classification, no external model-provider credentials, and future provider optionality documented consistently enough to shape implementation and CI? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Accepted Architecture Decisions/Testing Plan, Quickstart §Test Commands, Tasks §T009/T056/T067/T088/T098]
- [ ] CHK050 Are dependencies on MinIO/S3-compatible storage, RabbitMQ/Celery, PostgreSQL, Docker Compose, and Kubernetes-oriented deployment documented with clear local versus production responsibility boundaries? [Dependency, Plan §Technical Context/Deployment Plan, Quickstart §Prerequisites/Kubernetes Validation Direction]
- [ ] CHK051 Are task dependencies clear that safety tests, payload minimization tests, state-machine tests, durable outbox tests, and idempotency tests precede the corresponding implementation tasks? [Dependency, Tasks §Phase 2/Phase 5/Dependencies & Execution Order]
- [ ] CHK052 Are admin-scope assumptions explicit that Django Admin is sufficient for v1 and a custom admin frontend or separate admin API is out of scope unless specs change? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions/Out of Scope, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK053 Is the rollback-versus-persist-`classification_failed` branch in `FR-040` resolved enough to avoid two incompatible implementations for broker publish failure? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-040, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T047/T048]
- [ ] CHK054 Is there any conflict between preserving classification history for auditability and deleting photo objects when submissions are permanently deleted? [Conflict, Data Model §Data Retention and Privacy, Spec §Key Entities, Tasks §Phase 2 Locked Decisions/T090/T094]
- [ ] CHK055 Is there any conflict between allowing admin demographic filters and prohibiting demographic metadata from influencing classifier decisions? [Conflict, Spec §FR-026/SR-004/SR-005, Data Model §Privacy Rules, Tasks §T059/T074]
- [ ] CHK056 Is the checklist-worthy scope of "production readiness" bounded enough to exclude full enterprise hardening while still requiring the privacy, safety, CI, quickstart, and deployment gates already documented? [Ambiguity, Spec §Out of Scope, Plan §Scale/Scope, Quickstart §Kubernetes Validation Direction]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
